sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id UInt32, event_time DateTime);
INSERT INTO test_dates (id, event_time) VALUES (1, toDateTime('2023-10-01 12:00:00'));
UPDATE test_dates SET event_time = timestamp_sub(DAY, 10, event_time) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, event_time, timestamp_sub(MONTH, 3, event_time) AS new_time FROM test_dates;
DELETE FROM test_dates WHERE event_time < timestamp_sub(YEAR, 1, now());
